production.playableLoop: Select or drag a chess piece, inspect highlighted legal moves, commit a destination, and alternate turns until checkmate or stalemate.
production.objective: Checkmate the opposing king while obeying standard chess movement and king-safety rules.
production.progression: ChessGame owns turn, status, last-move, and promotion labels; piece components own board coordinates, kind, color, alive, and moved state.
production.failRetry: Checkmate and stalemate lock further moves; R restores the complete initial position and turn state.
feedbackMoments: Hover, selection, legal destination, last move, and check use distinct board markers.
Pieces ease between squares with a short lift arc.
HUD reports selection, invalid destinations, moves, turn, check, checkmate, stalemate, and promotion choice.

assetPlan.playerHero: Two complete source-authored chess armies with kind-specific silhouettes.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: The opposing army is the strategic obstacle surface.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Legal destination markers and captured pieces provide interaction feedback.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: A framed brass-and-walnut tournament board with authored light/dark square materials and studio lighting.
assetPlan.uiHud: Retained HUD exposes turn, game status, move history, promotion selection, and controls.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: ElevenLabs-generated local ambience, piece-move, capture, and check cues use portable script audio on web and desktop.

assetSourcing: Catalog search found Poly Haven Chess Set (polyhaven-model-chess-set), CC0, reviewed, but only as a non-direct high-detail index record; the example uses lightweight source-authored silhouettes instead.
Chess ambience and interaction cues were generated from authored prompts with ElevenLabs eleven_text_to_sound_v2 and stored as bundle-local MP3 assets.
knownBlockers: Desktop proof requires a graphical DISPLAY or WAYLAND_DISPLAY in the host environment.
